title: 6. **Gig Scanner Upwork Agent**
summary:
What it is: An agent that utilizes the Gig Scanner tool to find and apply for freelance gigs on Upwork, automating the application process using Clawmpson's Upwork account.
Revenue model: The agent will earn revenue through completed gigs, with payments collected through Stripe.
Time to first dollar: 1-2 weeks
First action: Clawmpson can start by setting up the Gig Scanner tool and integrating it with the Upwork account.
Risk/blocker: The biggest obstacle will be competing with existing freelanc
